objective: Verify the minimum safe MMAPI/NvBufSurface/EGLImage/CUDA scratch interop boundary before any CUDA dynamic warp integration or performance claim.

entry_context.project_positioning: Jetson Orin NX heterogeneous video compute and device-side dataflow optimization, with EIS as the representative workload.
entry_context.quality_anchor: resid_r15_s07 remains the accepted Regular-gate stabilization-strength anchor and is not changed in this loop.
entry_context.previous_positive_result: Standalone CUDA dynamic affine warp is much faster than VPI dynamic Remap payload rebuild in the 640x368 RGBA/Y8 diagnostics.
entry_context.previous_risk: Earlier unsafe low-level CUDA/pitch-wrapper routes caused non-identity tearing, so standalone CUDA speed is not enough to accept MMAPI CUDA scratch writeback.
entry_context.current_question: Can a minimal CUDA path safely write through the current MMAPI scratch boundary with identity first, then bounded non-identity diagnostics?
entry_context.claim_boundary: Safety verifier only. No EIS quality improvement, no zero-copy, no full real-time EIS, and no accepted MMAPI CUDA acceleration claim unless later measured by a separate contract.

frozen_variables: No live producer or matrix-generation rewrite
Start from identity before translate or dynamic affine
Use the existing accepted MMAPI main-chain boundary: block-linear NV12 main chain plus pitch-linear NV12_ER scratch semantics
Do not revive rejected pitch-pointer tearing paths as accepted evidence
No quality improvement claim from diagnostic output

result.decision: The minimum CUDA/NvBufSurface/EGLImage scratch interop safety verifier passed identity, shift, and dynamic_shift diagnostic runs with rc=0 and readable 640x360 outputs. Identity is the safety gate and had p95 black-border ratio 0.

shift_dx8.decision: diagnostic output proves non-identity write path is active; high black border is expected zero-fill shift behavior, not a quality candidate

dynamic_shift.decision: diagnostic output proves per-frame CUDA write parameters are active; high black border is expected zero-fill dynamic shift behavior, not a quality candidate

result.claim_boundary: Safety/dataflow verifier only. This does not claim EIS quality improvement, zero-copy, full real-time EIS, or accepted MMAPI CUDA acceleration.

task_queue.title: Control-plane registration
task_queue.objective: Register this active contract and verify onboard, doctor, and claim gates.
success_criteria: onboard reports this active task contract

task_queue.title: Patch-script safety implementation
task_queue.objective: Create a minimal patch script for the Jetson MMAPI transcode sample that routes the pitch-linear scratch stage through CUDA identity/translate/dynamic diagnostics.
success_criteria: non-identity modes are controlled by environment variables
logs include frame count and CUDA stage timing
Makefile gains the minimum CUDA link/include flags
stop_reasons: existing MMAPI sample markers are incompatible with a focused patch
implementation would require broad sample rewrite before identity verifier

task_queue.title: Local static validation
task_queue.objective: Validate contract JSON, syntax of Python patching code, and public hygiene before touching the Jetson.
success_criteria: no secrets or large artifacts are introduced

task_queue.title: Jetson patch and build
task_queue.objective: Patch a fresh MMAPI sample copy on Jetson and build it without changing system packages.
success_criteria: patch applies to a fresh sample copy
compile/link failures are classified without broad environment changes
stop_reasons: Jetson SSH or device access unavailable
CUDA/MMAPI headers or libraries unavailable and cannot be resolved minimally
build would require system-wide package changes

task_queue.title: Identity safety run
task_queue.objective: Run identity CUDA interop on a short Regular05 source first, then the full diagnostic if the short run is clean.
success_criteria: black-border check is non-regressive or classified
stop_reasons: cache or sync ambiguity cannot be classified locally

task_queue.title: Translate and dynamic diagnostic
task_queue.objective: Only after identity passes, run one translate mode and one dynamic affine diagnostic.
success_criteria: no block tearing or green output
stop_reasons: translate output tears or becomes unreadable
dynamic output tears or becomes unreadable

task_queue.title: Knowledge recovery if blocked
task_queue.objective: If CUDA interop fails in a way local inspection cannot classify, consult the knowledge routing layer and official/public sources before stopping.
success_criteria: one concrete recovery idea, one risk, and one verifier are extracted
internal-AI prompt is produced only if local/public evidence is insufficient

task_queue.title: Evidence closeout
task_queue.objective: Record measured or negative results, exact commands, evidence paths, and claim boundary.
success_criteria: README/presentation/evidence routing are updated only where useful
long-term context is updated with high-signal result only
review assets are copied to the categorized Windows review tree if generated

task_queue.title: Final validation and commit readiness
task_queue.objective: Run harness, JSON, diff, secret, and artifact checks, then prepare a coherent source/config/docs commit if appropriate.
success_criteria: large artifacts and secrets remain untracked
commit message trailer policy is followed if committing

forbidden_claims: MMAPI CUDA dynamic warp is accepted before identity and non-identity safety pass
full-pipeline acceleration from diagnostic timing alone
stop_reasons: Jetson SSH or device access is unavailable and cannot be recovered locally
identity output is unreadable, green, or visibly torn
CUDA/NvBufSurface/EGL interop requires broad sample rewrite before a minimal verifier
local/public knowledge cannot classify the CUDA interop blocker
